sections.label: TOOL CALL: python

<function=python>
<parameter=code>

print("=== After ===")
for n in after_seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] not in ('B', 'c', 'W'):
        print("Node %d: color=%s, pixels=%d, boundary=%s" % (n['id'], n['color'], n['pixels'], n['boundary']))
